metadata.name: Comply with a New Airworthiness Directive (AD)

description: The FAA has issued a mandatory AD that requires an inspection of the horizontal stabilizer on a specific aircraft model. A maintenance planner must ensure compliance.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all aircraft in the fleet that are affected by the new AD.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a list of affected tail numbers.

nodes.task_description: Create a new maintenance task card for the inspection required by the AD.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed task card for the technicians.

nodes.task_description: Schedule this new task to be completed on all affected aircraft before the AD's compliance deadline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the work for the entire affected fleet.
